summary: Internal dashboard project at /dashboard/internal with role-based sections: AdminUser (with Partner level dropdown fix), Asistenmu Dashboard (task management, delegation modal, tickets, history), AdminFinance (unchanged), and Superadmin (full access to all internal dashboard features).
architectural_notes: Role-based dashboard sections: Asistenmu, AdminFinance, Concierge, Superadmin at /dashboard/internal
Superadmin has unrestricted view of all internal dashboard sections
AdminFinance dashboard must not be modified

existing_features.title: In /dashboard/internal, inside the AdminUser section's Pending User list, replace the plain Partner text with a dropdown (options: Junior, Senior, Expert) controlled by a `partnerLevel` state, and add a text input for Verified Skill (comma-separated) below it — both visible only when the user's role is 'Partner'.

Add an `AsistenmuDashboardSection` component to /dashboard/internal that is shown when the logged-in role is 'Asistenmu'. It must include: (1) a summary grid with cards for List Client, Total Task, and per-status counts (PermintaanBaru, QAAsistenmu, RevisiClient, DitolakPartner, ReviewClient, Selesai); (2) collapsible task sections for each of those six statuses with a filter input (by ID or client name) and per-task action buttons (Delegasikan Task for PermintaanBaru, Kirim Review ke Client for QAAsistenmu, Kirimkan Revisi ke Partner + Selesaikan Task for RevisiClient, Delegasikan Ulang for DitolakPartner); (3) a modal for delegating a task with fields: Partner (id/principalId/nama/skill), Jam Efektif, Unit Layanan Terpakai, Link GDrive Internal, Link GDrive Client, and Batal/Delegasikan buttons; (4) a Tiket collapsible section with filter and a Resolve button for unresolved tickets; (5) a History collapsible section with filter. All data is local mock state (no backend calls required).

Ensure the Superadmin role at /dashboard/internal can view all internal dashboard sections (AdminUser, Asistenmu, AdminFinance, and any others) without restriction — i.e., the role-based conditional rendering must allow Superadmin to see every section.
Do not modify the AdminFinance dashboard section — its existing UI, layout, and logic must remain exactly as-is.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix AdminUser Partner Level dropdown in Pending User with Junior/Senior/Expert options and Verified Skill input
Build AsistenmuDashboard section with summary cards, task sections per status, delegation modal, tickets, and history
Superadmin can view all internal dashboard features without restriction; AdminFinance dashboard remains unchanged
